titleStmt.title: SII 9.295: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 295. (A.R. No. 513 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT BAPURAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1093, Khara, Māgha, śu. 5, Sōmavāra. In this year Māgha śu. 5 ended on Sunday (not Manday) = A.D. 1172 January 2. It refers itself to the reign of the Kalachurya-chakravarti, Rāyamurāri Bhujabalamalla-Sōmēśvaradēva, when the Mahāpradhāna Kariya-Kēśirājayya was ruling over Sindavaḍi one-thousand. On this occasion the learned Mahājanas of the agrahāra Tumbuḻa, who possessed royal honours, made a gift of land for the service of the god Chennabīyāḷa-Sōmanātha, set up by Bīcharasayya, son of the Sēnabōva Chāvarasayya of the Vasisṭha-gōtra. The Mummuridaṇḍas of Tumbuḷa are also said to have contributed cess on their commercial articles for the service of the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ . namastuṁgaśiraścumbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka kāḷāṁjana
puravarādhīśvara suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvaja ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇa kadanapracaṇḍa subhaṭarāditya kaligaḷaṁ
kuśa śrīmatkaḷacuryyacakravartti rāyamurāri bhujabaḷamalla sōmēśvaradēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire seleyahaḷḷiya nelevīḍinoḷ sukasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānananēkadēśādhipa
ti sakaḷalakṣmīpatiyantaṟpuraverggaḍe sītāḷacaṁdraṁ śrīmaddaṁḍanāyakaṁ kariyakēsirājayyaṁga
ḷu siṁdavāḍi sāyiramanāḷuttamire . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca śakavarṣada 1093 neya kha
rasaṁvatsarada māgha śuddha 5 sōmavāradaṁdu śrīmaccitraseleya vaṭavṛkṣataṭākatīrtthadiṁ paḍuvalu śrīma
dvaśiṣṭagōtrapavitra paramamāhēśvara sēnabōva cāvarasayyaṁgaḷa maga bīcarasayyaṁgaḷu taṁma kulasvāmi
śrisvayaṁbhu prasannacennabīyāḷa sōmanāthadēvaraṁ pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍidantappa śubhamuhūrtadalli ©
sakaladuritaśāṁtyai sarvvasaṁpatyavāptyai prakṛtivikṛtiviśvakritvanuṣṭhānasiddhyai nikhilasukṛtakrittyai muktayērdhēṁdumaulē
caraṇakamaḷayōstastānmadīyānnamasyā . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyāvadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānapārāyaṇajapa
samādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannaraupāsanāgnihōtradvijagurudēvatāpūjātatpararmmārttāṇḍōjvaḻakīrttiyutarssa
kaḻaśāstraviśāradar rugyajussāmātharvvaṇavēdapāragaruṁ yajanayājanaAdhyayanaAdhyāpanadānapratigrahaṣa
ṭkarmmaniyataruṁ śvētacchatracāmararājyacihnōpalakṣaṇalakṣitaruṁ śrīmatbhagavatīdēviya labdhavaraprasādarumappa śrīma
tsarvvanamaśyadagrahāraṁ tuṁbuḻa Aśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu Ā dēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ neṁ
dādīvigegaṁ naivēdyakkaṁ taṁma praviṣṭada tuṟughaṭeya mūḍaṇa beṁce yośānyadalli hālaharaviya dāriyinteṁkalūrmma
dhyakadoṟeyaṁ dhārāpūrbbakammāḍi koṭṭa mattarāṟu kaṁbavaṟunūṟu sthaḻadalli tāḷakeṟeya baḍagaṇa kōḍiya beṭṭadiṁ mū
ḍalu brahmabeṁceyoḷagaṇa teṁkaṇakuṟkeyiṁ paḍuvalu dōṇamayyanāyakara daśakada gurujevāḍadiṁ teṁkalūrmmadhyaka
vaṁ dhārāpūrvvakavaṁ māḍi koṭṭa kisumattaru nālku . śrīmatu dōṇamayyanāykara daśakada mahājanagaḷtamma hasugege baṁdāladahāḍa
vaṁ dhārāpūrvakavāgi koṭṭa kaṁbavēḻnūrumaṁ śrīmappurṣōttamabhaṭṭōpādhyāyara daśakada mahājanaṁgaḷa krayaparivartaneyāgi koṭṭu Ā tīrtthadiṁ baḍagaldā
riyiṁ paḍuva Ā mahājanaṁgaḷa hasugeyeḷnūṟu kaṁbamaṁ Avara kayyalu koṁḍu Ā dēvarige koṭṭudu Ā dōṇamaiyanāykara
daśakada hasugeya garbadugganagēḷu dōṇiyagadde ciṁtāmaṇigadde būreyagadde karedubaḍivana hāḷagaddeyaṁtaydu sthaḷaṁgaḷā
gi bīcarasayyaṁgaḷu ta(ṁ)mma semmina Oṁdu vṛttige Ā daśakada mahājanaṁgaḷanoḍaṁbaḍisi hasugeyaṁ dhruva Uṁḍigeyāgi hiḍida dō
yagadde kaṁbaṁ nūṟayivattumaṁ dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . Alli Ūraḍeyara daśakada mahājana gaḷa dibiyagadde kaṁbaveṁbhattumam dhārāpūrbba
ḍi koṭṭaru śrīmatsarbbanamaśyadagrahāraṁ hiriyagobbūraśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu ta(ṁ)mma praviṣṭadeṁmeyanūra dāriyiṁ paḍuva Ā holadereya
lakṣmīnārāyaṇadēvarige koṭṭa keyyiṁ baḍagalu śrī vighnēśvaradēvarige dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa māṇikēśvarada mattareraḍu . svasti samastapraśastisa
rmmasthaḷada nānādēsi mummuridaṇḍaṁgaḷu samasta bhaṇḍavaṁ māṟidātanalli Oṁdu hoṁge kāṇiyo(ṁ)ndu māṟugoṁḍātanalli 1 hoṁge kāṇiyondu hasara 1 kke Aḍake hē
ṟiṁge nūṟu hoṟege 50 Intinitumaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ koṭṭaru telligaru koṁḍa bhaṁḍa ga 1 kkaṁ kāṇiyaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ koṭṭaru . svasti samastapraśasti
matkīrttinārāyaṇapurapaṭṭaṇaṁ tuṁbuḻabīḍinalu śrīmatu kubēravaṁśānvayarappa śrīmadaśēṣanagaraṁgaḷu varṣaṁprati koḍuvantāgi dhārā
ṭṭa gadyāṇaveraḍu Alliya kammāṭadaccina moḷeyayakkasāligaḷu variṣaṁprati koḍuvaṁtāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa gadyāṇavoṁdu ta
ṣṭada beḷugaliya keṟeya hiṁdeyasēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu śrībīyāḷasōmanāthadēvara nivēdya
pūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa gadde kaṁba 200
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō mahadbhissarvvānētānbhāginaṟpā
yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi vi
Digital edition of SII 9.295 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
